criteria.label: Explain early stopping, patience, and restore best weights in one paragraph.
criteria.example: Write: monitor val metric each epoch; stop after patience passes without improvement; reload checkpoint from best val epoch — not the final epoch.

criteria.label: Read a train vs validation curve and identify the best epoch for stopping.
criteria.example: Given val/loss lowest at epoch 18 and rising after epoch 22 while train/loss keeps falling, state overfitting and recommend stop near epoch 18 with patience buffer.

criteria.label: Configure Keras EarlyStopping with val_loss, patience, and restore best weights.
criteria.example: Show EarlyStopping(monitor="val_loss", patience=10, restore_best_weights=True, mode="min") in a model.fit call with validation_data.

criteria.label: Implement a manual PyTorch loop with patience and best state_dict restore.
criteria.example: Pseudocode: track best_val_loss, save copy.deepcopy(state_dict) on improvement, break when wait >= patience, load best_state after loop.

criteria.label: Train XGBoost with early_stopping_rounds and predict using best_iteration.
criteria.example: Fit with eval_set=[(X_val,y_val)], early_stopping_rounds=20; predict with iteration_range=(0, clf.best_iteration + 1); print best_iteration.
